text.title: 7 Hours in Paris with Lila Moss
text.u: hi Vogue it's Lila
Moss I'm in Paris for the YSL show and
you're going to spend the day with me
it's not as cold and it's not raining
what more could you ask for do I know
any words in French I know pasik Tut
which means not Chic at all we are going
to offer a Bookshop it's got a great
selection of Art and photography and
fashion books
[Music]
look at the cute
dog he's really cute I want to film his
dog but I'm scared I'm shopping for
myself today nearly finished the book
I'm reading now it's elal life it's an
emotional roller coaster I'm heartbroken
and I need something to cling on to when
I finish it should we go
in my love for books came from my dad he
had has a big book collection I read 10
books last year which wasn't very many
and I'm trying to read more this year
it's busy they have such cool posters
too I want that I want that one I want
to get something I want to buy
something I'm going to get this as a
little souvenir of being in Paris for
the YSL show and being a fan of
style.com
mercy of now we are going to the matcha
Cafe which is around the corner matcha I
have like every morning and then I'll
drink tea throughout the
day let's
go usually my match order is iced Machel
lat with almond milk but they only have
coconut milk and oat milk here I forgive
them because their matches really good
how are you good could I please have a
Machel latte with coconut milk iced
please
Mery if you weren't here I'd be reading
my book in the cafe with my matcher um
my friends and my mom specifically think
it's very strange that I can come to a
cafe or restaurant and just eat alone I
don't mind being in my own little bubble
fashioned advice that I would give to
anyone trying to embrace Parisian style
if I don't know what to wear in I'm in
Paris I'll just go all black you can't
go wrong it's very chic little bit messy
French girl hair maybe a little red lit
everyone knows you can't come to France
or Paris without going to a French
Pharmacy and this has been me and my
mom's rule forever she loves a French
Pharmacy I love frenches they have the
best lip balms the best skin care the
best mints they just have everything the
best hair brushes even okay had my
pickme up feeling much more energized
and and now we're going to our last stop
which is the
[Music]
pharmacy I don't really sing in the
shower I feel I sing like in the street
or like when I'm not supposed to be
[Music]
singing so this is the pharmacy I've
been coming here every time I come to
Paris for many years
oh my God it smells so good in here like
perfect I already know I'm going to buy
things that I don't really need but
that's what happens when you're in a
French
Pharmacy okay I've heard that these body
creams are really
good the first thing on my list that I
really need is this bioderma oil
cleanser it's the first oil cleanser
I've used and I'm obsessed with it I
love it it's so good to take my makeup
off oh look at this
oh my God this is the most amazing
basket let me get out my shopping list
real quick oh I wanted to get some
homeoplasmine for my lips oh yes okay
this is homeoplasmine it's cheaper I
think in France cuz it's French brand
next thing was nuk's Body Oil which
smells amazing and reminds me of Summer
and then I saw a face mask at the front
that I want to get I've heard about this
and I haven't tried it so I think I
might need to try it out this is really
the star of the show these mints my mom
introduced to me I don't even remember
when years ago but they're like little
poppy mints and they pop in your mouth
thank you
welcome got our goodies and now we're
heading to the hotel to get ready for
the YSL show I'm wearing a long black
dress but the fun part is that it's very
low
back sky is blue
look at the pretty lamp shade last is
[Music]
beautiful okay so we're back at the
hotel and I'm going to go head up to my
room to get
[Music]
ready hey welcome to my hotel room this
is my
setup um and this is my Glam team paa on
hair
and Joey doing my makeup we're doing a
bit of
volume um for the hair and then for the
makeup we're going to do like a brown
soft smooky
eye I love a black Wing but like I
thought that brown Smokey soft Glam
would be better for this some things
that I would do to prepare for a show we
just did some under eye patches hanging
out with v three things that I always
pack a pajama set I love to be in a
pajama set I mean even at home I wear
pajama sets a black boot I think a black
boot for Paris is essential and then
maybe like sunglasses even though it's
always gray in
Paris okay so I'm going to finish
getting ready and get dressed and then
I'm going to show you my final look in a
minute I'm ready this is my look we have
sling bags and a lovely long black dress
it's so soft I'm so happy and then gold
Bangles and my
little
[Music]
bag I am most looking forward to seeing
the new collection and the chips at the
Afterparty thank you so much Vogue for
spending the day with me see you next
time the lift came perfect timing
[Music]
he
